summary: Completed comprehensive testing of PDF Bot API endpoints, PDF processing modules, and dashboard frontend. All core functionality working correctly.
passed_tests: API health endpoint returns healthy status
API stats endpoint returns correct processing stats
API logs endpoint returns empty array (no logs yet)
Dashboard frontend loads correctly with title and subtitle

Empty state shows correctly when no logs exist
Refresh button works and updates timestamp
PDF compression with Ghostscript working (reduced 3273 to 2758 bytes)
PDF A4 resize with PyMuPDF working (correct 595x842 dimensions)
Full PDF processing pipeline working (compression + resize)
Hero section with usage instructions displays correctly
No error messages or banners shown
